"I had an exceptional experience with the Law Office of Laura Wong-Pan PLLC in Poughkeepsie. Selling my house and closing on a new one was a complex process, but Laura’s professional care made me feel at ease from start to finish.

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words. I’m grateful for the opportunity to assist you and appreciate your trust.

reviews.text:
I retained this attorney at a rate that reflected what I believed would be active, detailed, and highly engaged representation. Unfortunately, the level of support and communication I received did not match the cost. Many times I felt that essential guidance, follow-up, and preparation were missing, and I often had to manage important parts of my situation on my own.

Given the hourly rate, I expected a more hands-on approach and clearer involvement in the details of my case. Instead, I frequently felt uncertain, without the direction that I believed should come with representation at this level. This made the experience especially disappointing.

I am sharing this so future clients can evaluate whether the style of representation aligns with their expectations, particularly if they need an attorney who is consistently proactive, communicative, and deeply involved in the work.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. I am sorry to hear that you felt unsupported at points during your case. Clear and consistent communication with clients are priorities in my practice. It is concerning to hear that you feel your experience did not reflect that.

Every case requires a different balance of strategy, efficiency, and client involvement, but it is always my goal for clients to feel fully informed and supported throughout the process. I take your comments seriously and will use them to continue improving my approach.

Be assured that your case had my attention and focus, as reflected in hundreds of emails and many meetings during the short period of representation.

Because online reviews are not the best forum for discussing confidential case-specific details, I would welcome the opportunity to speak with you directly to better understand your perspective. Your feedback is important to me, and I remain committed to providing the highest level of representation. Please feel free to contact me at your convenience.

Ms. Wong Pan’s summation of what employers should never do to employees with laws on the books that forbid this behavior at our last hearing was quite amazing. Anyone seeking counsel in a wrongful termination hearing should request the services of Laura Won Pan.

⚠️Warning ⚠️ DO NOT DO BUSINESS WITH RINALDI TAX! The manager Alessandra Rinaldi, who is the daughter of the owner, was extremely rude, condescending and completely ineffective at mailing out my taxes. I deeply regret trusting this deceitful,  manager named Alessandra Rinaldi at Rinaldi Tax.
I will never do business with Rinaldi Tax again.  I will also persuade as many people as possible to never do business with Rinaldi tax ever again. This complaint is especially directed at Alessandra Rinaldi who laughed at my situation while we were on the phone today. A problematic situation that she helped to create.
The whereabouts of my supposedly mailed out tax forms are unknown today because of Alessandra Rinald.

This manager will certainly destroy her father's business conducting herself in this manner.
She is extremely rude, unprofessional and ineffective.

I requested for Rinaldi Tax to mail out my "already prepared" 2020 tax returns back on the 17th of February.  I was charged $150 at Rinaldi Tax and I paid $150 to Rinaldi Tax for this service.
After I paid, Alessandra Rinaldi made it clear on multiple occasions that she was "busy" and that she hadn't mailed out my taxes.  This is common when it comes to the poor business practices and the business culture of legal practices in Dutchess county.
Good service or being a priority is often reserved for clients or customers who are perceived as having a higher value.
Alessandra Rinaldi began speaking to me as if I was an inconvenience to her. This confused me but I waited patiently.  She told me that she would mail out my taxes when she could.  I had to make follow-up calls (some of which were ignored) to verify that she mailed out my taxes.
She then claimed that she mailed my taxes out a week after she received them.
Later, this same manager would claim that she mailed out my taxes without being certified so there was no record of my taxes being mailed out. This was unimaginable!

After waiting months and not receiving my tax returns, I called Rinaldi Tax on a few occasions. I left a message, didn't receive a return phone call but I did speak with her on June or July of 2021 at Rinaldi Tax.
She told me to call the IRS because taxes were delayed this year.  Alessandra also claimed that she could not get a hold of anyone when calling the IRS.
I needed my tax return this year to help reinvest in my business, repair my car and cover other emergency expenses.  I was becoming increasingly concerned about the status of my tax returns.   When I was finally able to reach Alessandra Rinaldi in September 2021, she informed me that she was unable to show me proof of sending out my tax returns. She became dismissive when I asked questions to determine if she mailed out my tax forms to the IRS.   In response to my questions she tells me: "I'm not going to deal with this" and "What do you want me to do?"
I was surprised by her outburst and behavior.
I'm glad that I was in a public place while someone's camera was recording and they successfully captured our conversation.
She became angry and aggressive on the phone after I explained the financial situation I was in due to not receiving my tax returns.
She made sarcastic remarks regarding the hardships I'm experiencing.
I requested a refund.  At first she tried to tell me that it would take a week to return $150 to me.
I knew that was a lie and Alessandra Rinaldi was attempting to prolong my negative experience with her poor performance and horrible business practices.  After being insulted by Alessandra Rinaldi for rightfully asking about a refund, she eventually agreed to return my money the next day.
That was last Friday.  Today, I was able to get in touch with the IRS.  They have not received my tax forms.
I called to Rinaldi Tax to find out what happened and I was laughed at by Alessandra Rinaldi and told not to call back.
Very professional. Alessandra is extremely knowledgeable and thorough in her communications. She goes above and beyond for her clients, Highly recommend!

He was always on top of things, ensuring deadlines were met and making sure everything that needed to get done, got done. Chris and his assistant Lisa were always accommodating and an absolute pleasure to deal with.

They were thorough and diligent as well as personable and caring.  Chris consulted me every step of the way and brought comfort to an incredibly distressful ordeal.  They didn't see me as a convict and helped shine light on the innocence in a sticky potential DUI situation that required the time and patience of multiple court appearances.  My case was reduced to the lowest possible charge and I was able to keep my job.  I was grateful to the point of disbelief and have sung the praises of him and his staff to countless people since.
Got two tickets far from my home - his firm brought $1100 plus 6 points down to $200 and 0 points, for $400.  Very helpful too.  Recommend for anyone looking.

Chris went above and beyond to help me. I called his office at  4:45pm on a Tuesday night in desperation and spoke to Chris' paralegal, Sonya. She took the time to not just take a message but to ask me what I needed. Chris called me that night and by the next morning, the ball was rolling to fix the situation. Time was of the essense  and they did everything possible to resolve it. I cannot thank them enough. Sonya kept me up to date with everything. They are the best. Not only are they absolute professionals but they truly care.

As someone who is self employed and owns a restaurant, I didn't have the luxury of downtime. The Sobo & Sobo team worked tirelessly in the background on my case for months and did everything in their power to ensure I was made whole. While the injuries are long lasting, there's something to be said about an organization that doesn't give up, doesn't back down and is most importantly attentive and compassionate about their clients, getting to know them personally, not just professionally.

So while I do hope never to need their services again, I can safely say this was the one of the most best experiences with a law firm I've had in years.

They were representing me for a car accident.  Wouldn’t use this law firm especially if you are African American. This firm don’t follow through with returning calls. They made me feel as if they completely forgot about me and my case.   They continuously changed my lawyer.  They didn’t keep me informed. They didn’t make great decisions on my behalf, made their own decisions on my case without consulting with me. I felt so railroaded by the time the case was over with.

My truck was flattened by an oil truck.  Extracted by jaw of life. Unconscious for 45  minutes. There is a videotape of the incident that I  hunted down, not them. I received multiple serious injuries and was undergoing multiple medical treatments for years. My balance was decimated in one second. The first lawyer I was assigned had to leave SOBO and SOBO because of a sexual harassment case. No one bothered to tell me, their client. I was suppose to get 9% interest on top of my settlement from the date blame was assigned 100% to the driver of the oil truck.  Case was not settled for more than 5 1/2 years, largely because SOBO and SOBO is either understaffed or too passive or too chummy with the defense lawyers. We went to Dennis Kenny Law for a disability appeal. The initial appointment was very promising and hopeful. They did not live up to that. Our lawyer was extremely difficult to get a hold of, did not prep my mother for the hearing (unless you consider her meeting with us 20 minutes beforehand and telling us "it didn't look good"), did not submit paperwork to the court on time, and then lied to the judge during the hearing about when she received it. My mother was denied on multiple levels of appeals over the course of 2+ years, so she gave up and I left the negative review.

2 weeks after leaving the negative review, the lawyer contacted my mother saying she thought my mom should submit a whole new disability application because she really thought she'd have a better chance with a fresh application now that we could submit all the doctors supporting paperwork right off the bat. Again very promising and hopeful, so my mother agreed. My mom was again denied, and decided to not proceed with any appeals since it takes roughly 18 months to get a hearing before a judge and by that time she would already be retirement age and collecting social security.

So, she called Dennis Kenny Law and told them she was denied and did NOT want to appeal. What they did was APPEAL ANYWAY! They left my mom a voicemail saying "we know you decided not to appeal, but we think you have a good chance so we submitted an appeal anyway". My mom was so upset - she is disabled for crying out loud and does not need any more stress then she already has. She called them back and said she DID NOT want to appeal, and they told her well, now you will have to write us a letter saying you don't want to proceed so we can cancel it. So she did that, and we have yet to receive confirmation that they have closed her case.

There's much more I could say, but the bottom line is I do not recommend using this law firm after the complete disregard they showed for their clients wishes. Unbelievable.

reviews.text: I was billed by this law firm on 12/13/2021. I was wrongfully informed by reception that I would only be billed if I canceled the appointment. I was then informed to send police report documents to an email as I was seeking an order of protection from my ex. After sending emails, and phone calls my court date was approaching. I had not heard from the attorney. On my court date I made a final attempt with the office to speak with the attorney, I was walking into the court house when I received a very brief call from the attorney. As I have never done this before I was very confused as the terms he quickly threw at me and we ended the call as I was now in the court house. Due to not being formally prepared, a public defender represented me in court and I eventually retained a different attorney that I have been working with since. I would not consider a rushed 5 minute conversation as I'm walking into court, a consultation to be billed $350.00. I called the office and spoke with reception in the matter, she said it didn't seem right and she would talk to the attorney and get back to me. I never heard back. I’ve made several attempts to speak with the firm on the issue, they don’t get back to you. I disputed the claim with my bank. Their bank refused the dispute. I'm out $350 for no reason. Someone involved in a domestic after dealing with enough of a stressful situation, to be out of $350 for absolutely no reason other than they're just money hungry. STAY AWAY FROM THIS FIRM.

reviews.text: Barry Friedman is an outstanding Family/adoption attorney. He is extremely knowledgeable, compassionate, and truly goes the extra mile for his clients. Barry was always available to answer questions and consistently returned phone calls and emails promptly, which gave us great peace of mind throughout the process.  Mr Friedman made a meaningful difference for our family, and we are deeply grateful for his guidance. We highly recommend Barry Friedman to anyone navigating through any aspect of family court.  Highly recommend.

If you are searching for an adoption attorney, this is not just where you want to be, it is where you need to be. Barry Friedman will go above and beyond!
I can’t even begin to express my gratitude when it came to working with Barry Friedman. From our very first encounter I knew that he was the right attorney for our adoption. Everything from start to finish was explained throughly, and we felt well informed through out the process. He was dedicated, patient, strategic, but most of all kind. I knew his heart was in it for the good of the outcome. We were truly blessed to have such an amazing selfless attorney that was not in it for the money. Barry genuinely cared about us from start to finish and beyond. I can’t thank Barry enough for his care, compassion, tactfulness, time and attention to every detail that was needed for us to finally finalize our adoption!❤️ I am Forever thankful ! Barry Friedman will Forever will have a place in our hearts ! ❤️ Thank you from the bottom of our hearts!
If I could give 100 stars I would. Barry deserves an award for best adoption attorney in New York State.

He couldn’t help my situation but if you do need an attorney, he’d be a good one. Many recommendations for him. When I called he answered the line directly.
Great access.

Mr. Barry Friedman treated me very well and gave me a projected date for the conclusion of the case.  Despite of an un co-operative judge and scammer tensnt he was able to get the job done promptly. He is highly experienced in eviction laws, acted swiftly and gained the desired evictions two weeks prior to the projected date.  His charges were fair and gave value for every dollar charged as fees.  Will use him again and recommend his professional service to everyone in need of such services.  Look no further .  His mediation techniques were fair and both tenants left on their own.  " He is the Man".

Venkatram Mahadevan.
Great guy, highly competent attorney.  I am also an attorney, and I trust his advice. You can't do better than attorney Friedman..

If you are looking for an attorney who will listen to you and care about what you are looking for, hire Barry Friedman! I promise you won’t regret it. My husband and I were dealing with a very sensitive issue and Barry was so kind and understanding and made us feel so confident before even going into court. He’s very affordable compared to other attorneys out there and really takes the time to explain the law and how court will go. Hopefully we will never be in need of an attorney again, but if we are, Barry is the one we will call.

Mr. Friedman was recommended to me by another attorney. He took on our complicated adoption case that no other attorney would touch. He responded quickly to our questions and kept us informed every step of the way. He was very knowledgeable and confident which was reassuring during a stressful time. He did an excellent job representing our case. A pleasure to work with! Highly recommend!

Barry Friedman is the best family lawyer you will ever work with. He helped us with my daughters paperwork and the process was very smooth and fast! His rates are very reasonable in comparison with other family lawyers, and his timeline for completing the process is very accurate.
We started the paperwork in February 2023 and by June 2023 everything was done. Not to mention that, I took my time collecting all the documents required by the court, and the process was still very fast.
Mr. Friedman is very nice and extremely polite, went out of his way to accommodate and always answered all of our questions, and we had many.
We are very pleased with the results and recommend Mr. Friedman 100%.

It is so great to see that Barry Friedman is still changing lives and helping families!  He represented me 20 years ago in a matrimonial case and I could not have asked for a better attorney.  I am fairly certain that it is one of the most memorable cases of his career, and he has some souvenirs to show.  Thank you Barry for helping me through one of the most difficult times in my life and I am happy that we can look back and have some laughs about it now.
Good lawer
I was impressed with how he responded to his clients.  He remembered the history of his client. I would want him to take care of my legal issues.

There are no words to express  my gratitude  towards Mr Friedman  he's just beyond  5 stars  but that's all they give he's actually  a 10 star lawyer thank you Mr Friedman  !!!

reviews.text: I can highly, and without reservation, recommend Maura Barrett as an attorney. In handling my divorce, she was incredibly professional, responsive and knowledgeable. She listened with compassion and guided me through a rather sticky divorce to great outcome. She and her staff were immediately responsive to everyone of my questions and followed up quickly with answers. I felt in capable hands and very heard during a difficult moment and I could not have asked for better representation. I might add, that she was able to save me money on court costs with good decisions.
Incredible person and an even more incredible lawyer! I appreciate everything she has done for me and my little family!

I cannot say how deeply grateful I am to have met Ms. Barrett.  She has been an angel in helping me through various petitions from my ex husband with custody/visitation hearings, and with trials of the same.  It has been years of constant battle, and through it all, she was always a voice of reason and supporter along with the skills of knowing the law and managing all that comes with dealing with family and children.  She is always in the best interest in the child.  If you are looking for a champion in your corner to help you navigate family matters in court, Ms Maura Barrett is your lawyer.

I highly recommend Maura! Maura was excellent throughout my child custody case. She is very knowledgeable of the Law and defended my case with determination. Good day. Since 1992, my firm helped workers injured in all kinds of accidents until my recent retirement from solo practice. From 1986 to 1992, I helped people similarly situated so for other firms. “I am an attorney with four decades of experience securing the compensation that New York construction workers injured on the job are entitled to receive… (see firm webpage)”. The judge I saw was annoyed by him every time he spoke. I’ve had better luck with legal aid in the past. In the court he would say 1 sentence and look at me for an awkward school boy approval. I’M PAYING YOU TO KNOW WHAT TO SAY AND HOW TO SAY IT. It was very unprofessional. I’ve spoken to several lawyers while I was working with him, which I paid them for because he wouldn’t respond to me. reviews.text: I have been using Daniel now, in between 4 and 6 years, and the first thing I'm going to say is all those years ago, when I reached out to Dan and he represented me on my first case, that point forward mr. Miller was the only lawyer in my contacts on my phone which is how it is to this current day. The only thing I'm upset about at this point is the fact that there are we five stars I could give him and not 10. Each and every time Daniel came to court for me which since that first time I reached out to him, has been numerous times each year and there has not been one matter I needed his assistance on that I was even slightly disappointed with. Some people like myself are very mechanically inclined, I could fix anything I could build anything, and then you have people I can, who has a natural gift, is beyond talented as an attorney , and knows his way through the court system like nothing I've ever seen in my life. I've had family members to me that are very very dear that needed help, and needed a lawyer's assistance and without even hesitating I went right into my contacts and sent them Daniel's information, and I'm so happy to say that each and every person I sent the Daniel, he took care of as if they were his family as well and they couldn't be happier with the results. It is actually become a great friend of mine over the years and I would tell anyone just as I have been, don't panic, just call Dan, and just sit back and relax and watch the magic happen. What makes tan Stand Out To Me Above just about every other single lawyer I've ever seen in my life is not only is he a genius when it comes to law, but he cares about each and every one of the people he represents and I could tell you now from the first time I met Dan I instantly could feel that Which made me very happy because I knew I made the right decision. I've had him represent me on everything from tickets to a little more serious misdemeanor offenses right on over to a DUI, that I unfortunately had gotten, and before I even had time to process what was going on, like literally as I was walking into the courtroom he was walking out grabbing me saying okay we're all done and I just looked at him like I haven't even sat down yet LOL. Dan has truly been a blessing to me and on top of being extremely motivated and persistent, on top of caring about each and every one of the people he represents, he's also incredibly affordable. So needless to say Dan will remain the only lawyer in my phone, probably long after I reached the point where I don't even need to be represented anymore. So there's no need to put yourself in a position to end up receiving what I like to call societies back hand across the side of your head, just called Dan sit back and relax, and let him do what he is best at.

I was trying to complete the Naturalization process for my three kids and the USCIS were giving me the run around. First I filed the N400 which was the right process since they were minor when I became a US citizen. They rejected the application for reasons best know to them. I waited for them to be adults and they filed the N600 and USCIS said the kids were not supposed to file N600 and they should go and file the N400. This got me really frustrated, we know they don't refund and we know how expensive these applications are for three kids and a struggling immigrant. It was eating deep into my lean purse. I decided to go online and look for an immigration lawyer that covers my county. I called a few and they wanted me to register before they could do a virtual meeting for to discuss my problems. I wanted to talk to someone and the I found the office of Igunbor with office in Poughkeepsie and Newburgh. I called and he gave me an appointment the following day without a few. I went to see him and told me there was nothing wrong with what I done, but he he would do one or two things differently and my kids case will a forgotten issue. Five months later all my kids are now naturalized citizens via the N600. I kept to his words and he did what he said he was going to do. The fun part of it is that, I am even the one chasing him so I can pay up the balance 😀😀😀. I will recommend him to anyone within the NYS that help with immigration lawyer.

I retained him for his expertise in 2A law and was nothing short of grateful. He’s extremely fair and worth every penny. I cant speak highly about his integrity nor his ability to be successful while in your corner. Highly recommend him for any of your legal needs.

I was referred to Anthony by a friend who told me I'd love this guy, and she was right! If you need an attorney, this is The Man - period. He is responsive, understanding, efficient, and really (really!) good at his job.

From the beginning he was honest, straightforward, set realistic expectations, and fought for me hard in court despite the fact that *I* was difficult to deal with at times. My only regret is not following all of his advice sooner, as my custody case concluded the exact way he had expected and the way I had hoped. He was patient and respectful with me even when I was challenging (never even been to court for a traffic ticket so this was hard as a new mom). I cannot recommend him enough. Anthony was very helpful in every aspect! Will most definitely use his services next time.

We know from first hand experience how daunting the pistol permit application process can be, and how the slightest mistake in the application, or small blemish on a record can delay the result or be cause for denial. We have the upmost faith and trust in him and his ability to help clients achieve their goals of protecting themselves and their families.
There is literally no one I trust more by my side than Anthony Cillis. I'm on major mistake and strike number two, the only person keeping my mind at ease is Mr. Cillis.

Everything was supposed to be done by the end of March, and then COVID-19 took hold and everything court related was shut down. Because of this, court dates kept getting pushed back and rescheduled. Needless to say, because of the environment that COVID-19 put us all in, Anthony was able to adapt to that changing environment flawlessly. I could not ask for a better result!

Anthony is much more than an attorney. He is literally a jack of all trades when it comes to his craft. You will not be disappointed with his professionalism and knowledge of the criminal justice system.
Mr. Cillis has been in my corner since day one and not just in respect to my case but my personal well being. I could not have asked for better representation.
Anthony really cares about his clients. He puts his heart in everything he does. He won't sleep until he gets the job done. Thank you for giving me the tools to win my case.

There many times I was in tears being concerned for my 2 year old daughter and he reassured me that everything would turn out ok! It did! The agreement he did for me is not your traditional 50/50 agreement! I was speaking to another lawyer just having lunch next too one and explained my situation and he said that my order was very unusual and I was very fortunate to have gotten what I did!
Unfortunately I am going back to family court and I called Anthony on a weekend very upset and he took his own personal time to speak to me and help me!
If you need a lawyer that truly cares about you and your family he is the one!!! You will not be disappointed!!!!
Thank you Anthony for everything!💕💕💕

Anthony was very attentive when I needed him most. He always gave great advice which helped me as a father fighting for my kids. He was very strategic during a trial and we came out on top. I trust Anthony with my life! Definitely recommend for any type of law service.

My previous attorney departed the firm and Anthony was handed my case halfway through my divorce. Not only did he make me feel comfortable about my case moving forward but he also worked very  diligently to catch him self up on my cases history.
He is genuine, hard working, maintains thorough correspondence, and will fight aggressively for what is best for his clients. He gives you real talk without the fluff and BS.
Anthony always gives it to you strait. He has helped me on two separate occasions and will always be my lawyer! Thanks for keeping me with my family!

Was disappointed with Mr. Klein.
A fairly easy case with false allegations from one parent towards the other.

The $25,000 I gave Mr. Klein the first day we met,Lead me to believe he was our attorney.

We didn’t know he contracted  out other attorneys to do his work. He just takes the money and gives a good sales pitch.

One  of his contracted attorneys  he assigned to our case, works for Kingston, Family court.
We could have obtained her or someone like her for free

The case lasted  over 4 four years with very little movement.

Mr Kleins  contracted attorney told us that key motions were filed.  We found out later they were not filed.

The biggest loss was not so much the $25,000.  It was the seven children that cried out for 4 years for their parent.

The other parent seemed  angry, vengeful, yet happy knowing she could easily get her way with a false allegation.  One that was never questioned or brought up in court.  And the attorneys ignored that.

Had the faults allegations
been addressed the case would’ve been over in 3 to 6 months as Mr. Klein promised.

Mr. Klein never once involved himself in the
The case, even though I asked him over and over to please step in.
After over four long years, the children finally got to see and visit the accused parent.
No evidence whatsoever for the false allegation.

We hired Stephen, not several other people that worked on the case.
He is a very good salesman, and because of that could have used that sales pitch to fight for us and the children.   But he didn’t.

I had to hire another attorney and left a lot of unused money on the table with Mr. Klein, which he would not even return a portion.

I’ve learned not to Google the most popular attorneys on the Internet. And I don’t know where the five stars come from.

I would go to someone that presents themselves more truthfully. I paid for what he promised, and he didn’t quite step up to the plate.

Mr. Klein’s response to this is totally false. He offered to handle the case from start to finish for $25,000 and I paid him that day.
He remembers very well the case, as I have letters that I wrote him pleading with him to step in. The case lasted four years because we had to hire another attorney leaving money on the table, but it still did not close for four years because the next attorney was not much better. She tried.
Mr. Klein may have been a good attorney, but he would not show any of his abilities.
He put the case in other inept peoples hands and had no information about the case
Yet he was the one we paid and he was the one we thought would represent us.

This also happened to a friend of mine, whose daughter asked for money back from him when he didn’t come through with his promises.  Fortunately, she gave a retainer with minimal loss.
With his great sales pitch, we went for the $25,000 deal to do it all.

I’m just trying to save others from the grief we went through and the emotional  damage of the seven children that were involved.
Not only did Mr. Klein  not take the case to heart, neither did the courts. It was all about who the best lawyer was, and we didn’t have a good one.
The other side did. And had we hired that attorney , the results would’ve been different for sure.

When looking for an attorney, I would carefully investigate their history and background. It can be very telling and might prevent disappointment and financial loss.

Perhaps he’s changed now five years later.

I could easily post a letter I wrote to him as it’s still on my computer, pleading for him to step in.
I’m not sure why he’s denying this case. It’s similar to how he denied us legal help and support when we needed it.
reviews.ownerResponse: While we understand that we aren't perfect, and we welcome criticism, we cannot allow false reviews to go unanswered and mislead the public.  This review is just that for several reasons.   First, we don't charge $25,000 retainers for Family Court cases.   Our highest Family Court retainer is $3,500.  Second, no proceeding in Family Court takes 4 years. The court is constrained by state "standards and goals," and the most complicated cases rarely take longer than a year.  Most are done well within that.  Third, we do not "contract out" our cases.   90% of our cases are handled directly by Steven Klein, and the rest are handled by our associate.   Finally, we cannot find any case we handled in Ulster County for a client with this name that comes close to matching any claims made in the review.

reviews.text: I can't say enough about Mr. Klein! I hired him to help with a sensitive issue, and was blown away by the effort and care that went into my case. He is professional, kind, the staff is amazing and communicative...my family couldn't be happier with the outcome. I highly recommend working with him! Thank you, Steven, for everything you've done for my family. We are so grateful!

He was incredibly knowledgeable, attentive to every detail, and truly fought tooth and nail for me. I’m so grateful for his dedication and the way they advocated for me during the last year. I highly recommend him to anyone in need of a strong attorney.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind words, Caitlyn.  It was my pleasure to represent you!

reviews.text: Anyone with a shred of common sense would see through Klein's lies.  He is claiming I didn't pay my bill, but had the money to hire another attorney? Lies.  I have no debt with him.  Steve Klein ran for public office, but lost, all while he should have done more to help my difficult divorce case.  I guess he thinks he is a judge somewhere? Sorry. but I do not see Judge Klein in any of my Google searches.  I see that Steven Klein's partner he hired, Cindy Sanchez,  has been banned from practicing law.  If you see Steve Klein's website lately, it lists the only attorneys in this firm is Steve and his recently deceased father...Is Steve looking to ride his deceased dad's coattails or garnering sympathy?  Just so bizarre...Please inform yourself before trusting Steven Klein.
reviews.ownerResponse: Nice to hear from you Ms. Zamborsky.  We were doing quite well on your case when you chose to retain different counsel and did not want to pay your bill. No hard feelings.  We fought hard for and would have continued to do so to the end had we had the opportunity.  Mr. Klein did not have any political interest at the time of your case.  He was asked to run for Judge over a year after you switched attorneys.  He won his election and did not lose as you suggest.  And he does not recall seeing you in Court.  Had he, he certainly would have said hello and been friendly to you as always.

reviews.text: This Office is very professional. I chose to hire Steven Klein which i was very pleased. He will represent your case and fight hard for you. I Recommend anyone who needs an attorney to call. If I can give it a 10 I would. Thanks again Steven for your service 😇 really appreciate you.

Over the past 2+ years, Mr. Klein’s knowledge, determination, visionary leadership coupled by his negotiating skills, and distinguished performance by delivering strong and sustainable topic gains has led to a fair resolution in my county’s Supreme Court for my divorce enforcement proceedings.

She is retired now but when a friend of mine needed an attorney I recommended her. I also hired a woman is my second attorney when I fired this guy!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Mr. Beska, unlike many others who have left reviews, you were indeed a former client, though your case was over seven years ago. While we’re sorry to hear that you were dissatisfied, it’s important to note that the outcome of any legal matter often depends on the client’s willingness to follow legal advice. You were, of course, free to seek different representation at any time, and we respect that choice. However, we believe your conclusions about our work are premature, as we were not given the opportunity to fully resolve your case. We also understand and respect your right to share your experience, though we do hope this will provide some closure after all this time. We wish you all the best moving forward.

They were always prompt in responding to my questions and kept me well-informed on the progress of my case.

My husband and I recently retained Mr. Klein for a family court matter. This was the second time we have worked with him. During such a stressful time, it is relieving to have such a good team to rely on. Steven is a straight-to-the point attorney with extensive legal knowledge, who heard our concerns and fought for what was right for us. Contacting him was seamless and anytime we had what we felt was a crazy after-hours question, he answered clearly and promptly. His office staff is wonderful and were so helpful in this process as well. We are so thankful for Mr. Klein and the team at Klein & Sanchez.

My experience with this firm was extremely disappointing, particularly with Cindy Sanchez. She demonstrated a lack of attention to detail and poor case management throughout the process. Cindy consistently waited until the last minute to contact me, often just before hearings, yet billed for "preparation" time despite showing no real preparation, focus, or strategy. Her involvement ended up being more of a liability than a help, and I had to be the one fixing the issues she caused just to keep my case moving forward, not without challenges due to the poor management of my case. Her focus was on trying to make me settle for nothing, all in benefit of the opposing party.

Additionally, the firm charged for tasks I never requested, and despite promises, I never received the remainder of my retainer back. Communication was a nightmare—calls were canceled repeatedly (one time a scheduled call was cancelled at the scheduled time, five times in a row, to be exact), and I had to constantly remind them about necessary submissions or deadlines. It became clear that she was overbooked and unable to provide the level of focus or service needed (and which they certainly charge for).

Believe the negative reviews: this firm seems more interested in excessive billing than effective representation. I would strongly advise looking elsewhere for competent legal help.

This team is second to none. They helped me navigate one of the most difficult cases I'm sure they've ever faced. No matter the obstacle, this team was able to push through and we ended up exactly where we needed to in the end. HIGHLY recommend.

Very knowledgeable attorney. I'm from Poughkeepsie, but live down by NYC. Steve and his Associates handled my case in Manhattan professionally, getting me my desired outcome, for a significantly lower price than Manhattan attorneys. Very pleased and will use him again.

Update (2024). Steve helped me win full custody of my younger daughter. As a father, that's not an easy thing to accomplish. Very satisfied with his work.

Took a year to get an annulment filed. Had to send repeat copies of documentation to the firm 3 different times. Received multiple versions of the status of the case from 4 different people in the firm. Then to top it off, poor judgement on our part. They keep the remaining retainer fee which was a heck of a tip. Terrible unprofessional and completely non customer friendly law firm. Go anywhere else
reviews.ownerResponse: Based upon the email address under which this review was filed, we have determined that it was not filed by our client, but by the other side of the case.  Our client sent us a very nice note, thanking us and telling us that she got the right lawyer in this case.  It did not take a year to file.  It was filed within 3 weeks of our being retained.  And our client was charged exactly what we both agreed to when we were retained.  There was no overcharge or "tip."  It is always a special honor to us when our client is happy with our work and the other side in a case who writes a review to try to bring us down.  We will continue fighting for our clients as we have for three generations.

reviews.text: Steve was excellent. Fought for me and answered any and all questions throughout the process. Highly recommend.

Steve has No communication , unprofessional

Does not respond to emails or calls for the life of him!!!!

reviews.ownerResponse: We are sorry to hear that you think we are awful.  We suppose that is because we represented the other side against you in this case.  We fight hard for our clients and that often results in the other party being less than complimentary of us.

reviews.text: Klein and Sanchez are the best.  Mr Klein really knows the law and is a top notch attorney who does the best for his clients.  You will not be disappointed.

I have had the absolute best experience with this law firm. Everyone from the staff to the representation were absolutely wonderful! A case that dragged on and felt like it would never end before I called Klein and Sanchez. With the help of this law firm it finally ended and I am so grateful to have been pointed to them for representation! Ms. Sanchez is professional, on point and handled my case beautifully and I cried with joy when the nightmare was finally over! Mr. Klein was accommodating, professional and so kind in every interaction. If you need something taken care of, look no further! Not all heroes wear capes! Thank you again to this incredible law firm for helping me with such a tough case!
Highly professional and caring. Steve and his team helped guide me through an extremely difficult time. Would highly recommend them to anyone going through a divorce.

Steven Klein handled my divorce; he was very professional and always responded in a timely manner. I felt comfortable asking him and his wonderful staff multiple questions and always got a fast and reliable response. I would highly recommend Klein & Sanchez; they have given me my start to a new beginning.

Steve Klein handled my divorce along with a rather complicated and complex custody case and he fought with me to the very end. He was patient and professional. He always responded timely and I always felt comfortable asking him numerous questions and Steve was always fabulous!!
Thanks to Steve my life is whole again!
I’d recommend Steve to anybody looking for an attorney!
Thank you Steve!
Steven is very direct and knows his stuff!   He should be your first stop in any family legal matter.
We highly recommend this law firm! Steve Klein and his team were professional, detail-oriented, and personable. Exactly what we needed!

I gave klein & Sanchez a 5 star rating due to their attention to detail and the timely manner in which we were assisted. Originally we needed a parents  estate organized, most recently a trust was needed. Both of these matters were quickly and efficiently taken care of. I would definitely recommend klein & Sanchez and their great staff for all your legal needs. JOHN & SHELLEY

I hired Mr. Klein a year after serving my ex-husband with divorce papers and exhausting attorney fees from a previous attorney.  My initial conversation with Mr. Klein was direct, detailed and straight to the point and it was then I knew he was the attorney for the job.  One thing that always impressed and reassured me about Mr. Klein was his swift response to my emails.  He always made me feel like a priority and was very detailed in his response.  Mr. Klein listened to my concerns, gave me the best legal advice and always protected me as his client and worked within my best interest as a client and a mother.  Mr. Klein settled my case within a reasonable timeframe and ensured that the divorce ruling was in my favor.  I am grateful that I found him and I would recommend him to anyone going through a divorce.  I wish I would have hired him from the beginning.  Mr. Klein and his team worked quickly, professionally and they were assertive.  They were a pleasure to work with.

Steven Klein is an excellent attorney who will work hard for you to achieve a satisfactory outcome. In my experience Steven was very accessible and easy to communicate with. He handled himself with precision and professionalism inside and outside of the courtroom. Highly recommend.

They would not give me a consultation because the other party in the case was related to another attorney that worked in Dutchess county, not even with their firm. When asked why they were rude and I asked for the receptionist first and last name and she laughed at me. Very unprofessional.

This guy (Steve Klein) turned out to be the greatest nightmare of my life. I am going through a divorce and he couldn't care less about anything to help in any way or form. He comes to the sessions 100% unprepared and unaware of the situation and has let the other party do whatever they want as he stays so quiet about everything. My case is almost over and he has not said a single word to help with my case. On the other hand, he is money charging machine. Imagine, he never talks to you period! not over the phone and nor in person and so far, he has charged me over $10,000 just to start yelling at me in front of the judge and to blame me for the NO JOB that he has done in this case. As another reviewer said, "don't just walk away from this beast, run away from him". That is the best advice I can give to you and God knows I am speaking the truth!
reviews.ownerResponse: We welcome critical reviews from our clients. It allows us to improve.  But we have never had a client with this name, and no case with circumstances like those described here.  If you are a client posting for some reason under a false name, please let us know so that we can address your concerns appropriately.

reviews.text: Sometimes life throws us some curve balls, and we find ourselves in need of legal representation. I’ve known Steve for many years, and can personally attest that, as his client, my family and I have greatly benefitted from his vast experience, extensive knowledge of the law and sound judgment. He quickly grasps the nature of the case, carefully assesses the possible pathways to a successful resolution and provides his honest opinion as to how to best proceed. I’ve seen him in action during two challenging trials, and his commitment to me as a client has always been commendable and flawless. Steve used his intelligence, expertise and years of devotion to the rule of law to counsel and guide me through the tumultuous waters of the law and lead me to victorious results. It’s very comforting to know that, should I ever need help on a legal related matter, I can count on him to stand by my side. Lastly, I must say that Steve is a good, honest man who is able to empathize with me and my family and offer comfort and reassurance when we need most. Thanks Steve.

Excellent experience with Steve Klein and his team. They were thorough, professional, supportive, and responsive through the entire process. Thankful for his help in making what can be a challenging and stressful life experience as painless as possible!
Very rude and unprofessional lawyer.
reviews.ownerResponse: This individual has never been a client of our firm.   We do not condone posting of claims that are not based upon actual client experience, as they are not helpful.

reviews.text: Stephen Klein represented me in my divorce. He handled EVERYTHING for me and was very efficient. He made my divorce completely stress free, and he was an absolute pleasure to deal with. I would highly recommend him.

Steven, and everyone in the firm, was always very professional, courteous, and diligent with me. Just as important, they never blew smoke up my rear end. From the beginning, Steve gave me counsel in a straightforward manner, correcting me when I thought it was going to go one way. He’s been through this many times, for me hopefully just this once.
My ex was determined to get full custody of our children, higher child support, alimony, half my 401k, while not giving up anything on her end. Patiently and methodically, Steven Klein and associates made her concede on every point. I signed my divorce owing zero alimony, having 50% custody of my kids, keeping my 401k, and maintaining the previous child support agreement (less than he NYS amount typically due).
Money well spent.

Thank you Steve & co!

I would recommend Stephen, Claire and this law firm to anyone, I was going through a very difficult time, trying to see my son it was a very tough emotional time for me, they were all very helpful, professional and caring...Claire worked extremely hard on my case and was always accessible to talk,  too, to answer any questions I had whether it was a Sunday or later in the evening during the week..the people at the office are extremely nice and easy to talk to as well and they are understanding and will work with you when it comes to payments ....I thank them for helping me and iam very happy with the results

reviews.ownerResponse: We have no record representing anyone by this name, and the details do not match any of a case we have handled. reviews.text: Anyone who has dealt with the NY state family court knows how biased it can be against fathers.  I felt that it was hopeless to expect custody of my son because the court had been so lenient on my ex in the past.  However, Mr. Klein gave me renewed hope.  I never had to worry about anything regarding the case because he and his office were so diligent.  I spoke to him before the pandemic hit and he continued to work throughout the entire year to rapidly resolve the situation.  Just yesterday I SUCCESSFULLY ACQUIRED CUSTODY OF MY SON and I could not be more satisfied with my lawyer's performance.  He handled every obstacle with tact and grace and I barely had to speak at all except to confirm my identity.  He never compromised with the opposing counsel and he never made any deals without speaking with me first.  I HIGHLY RECOMMEND STEVEN H. KLEIN & ASSOCIATES!!

Divorce is one of the hardest things a person can go through, and you need an attorney with the right experience and approach to navigate you through it. Steve Klein was just that for me. From the moment I walked into his office, his deep knowledge of the law became clear to me immediately and gave me confidence that I would get through it ok. He stayed with me every step of the way and helped me get an outcome that I found to be both fair and favorable. He always had my best interests at heart, and his attention to detail is extraordinary. It is a stressful ordeal to be sure, but I always felt that Steve had my back. If you are looking for a true professional and an attorney you can trust, I recommend Steve Klein very highly.

Steven Klein is one of the best lawyer in the City of Poughkeepsie. I came to him couple of months ago after being referred by a colleague n I must say his reviews are true testimony to the man he is . He brings great knowledge and provides high quality service to his clients in the courtroom. I came to him feeling defeated n full of sorrow and anxiety . He told me " don't worry, I will take care of it " and he has lived by his words to this day . I feel more confident and assured the way he has been taking on my case . I feel extremely blessed and grateful of the outcome to my case . If you are someone, looking for a lawyer in divorce and child custody case . I recommend Mr.Klein as your best bet in making you win the day . I will say it again, he is one of the  finest and most confident lawyer  in the city .Very professional, articulate and prompt !

As a fellow litigator, I always enjoy working with Steve on cases.  Steve is a zealous advocate for his clients while always keeping the best interests of his clients' children at the forefront.  Ending a marriage is difficult and choosing your attorney is critical.  I would highly recommend having Steve guide you through this process.  His experience and guidance will put you at ease.

Was recommended by a very trusted friend.
I was dealing with a custody dispute that I had zero indication was coming my way. I thought I had hired the best possible attorney for the job but soon felt like I was getting a terrible deal with not much time to be a father. I fired her and hired steve and 4 days later I was being offered 3 times the amount of time with my child. Absolutely indescribable how grateful I am for how much he help me. He showed the highest level of diligence with his prompt responses to every question and concern I had. Ran down every issue with thorough research and ultimately saved my place as a father in my daughters life. I hope I never have to use him again but will hire him without question if I need. Such a painful situation I was forced into and I really felt like he had my back through it. Made it all just a little easier to swallow at the end of the day.  Highly recommend this legal team for you to have in your corner. Can't thank them enough.

Considering how disrespectful an attorney associated with this law was to in a phone consultation, I would give them a big phat Zero if I could. Just another reminder of just how out of touch most lawyers are with the average citizens.

Also, why are all the Reviews associated with this law firm all 5 star rated. You mean to tell me all of your previous clients all had a 5 star rating. I find that hard to believe as rude as the lawyer was who spoke to me over the phone.
reviews.ownerResponse: The reason we have so many 5-star reviews, is that we work very hard for our clients to get them good results. I am sorry that you believe we are rude, but considering that you never became a client, it would be difficult for you to gauge our professionalism and abilities.  We did not find it appropriate that you chose to yell and swear at us during your free consultation, simply because you did not like the advice we were giving. When you chose to continue speaking to us in that manner, I terminated the call.  It was the first time in over 20 years that I had to do so, and I hope it will be the last. I do wish you the best, however, in finding what it is that you're looking for it.

If you are seeking a law office that will efficiently complete the process, look no further. They processed my closing and handled all necessary matters with utmost professionalism. I was only required to sign a few forms and attend the closing, while they took care of all the requisite paperwork. Mike was consistently available to address any queries and was a pleasure to work with. I highly recommend this firm ⭐️ five stars

It was truly such a pleasure working with Michael for my condo purchase. From start to finish, he was friendly, professional, and responsive. He provided clear explanations whenever I had questions. He stayed on top of all the details and made what could have been a stressful transaction as smooth as possible. I know he fought for my interests every step of the way. I would work again with Michael in a heartbeat if the opportunity ever arose. And I highly recommend him to anyone looking for a reliable and attentive real estate attorney.
Michael did a great job for me drafting a lease and answering ad-hoc questions. He is very knowledgeable yet patient and clear.

Mike is a fantastic attorney that I would trust with a variety of practice areas.  I have known Mike since law school and then we worked together at large real estate law firms in New York City.  He is straightforward, honest, and dependable.
Michael is incredibly professional. He helped me with a swift resolution. I will be using him in the future and have recommended him to several people already.
Michael is an outstanding attorney. He is extremely caring, thorough, and knowledgeable. I highly recommend!

I had an incredible experience working with Michael. He is professional, reliable, and genuinely committed to helping his clients. He takes the time to understand every detail, communicates clearly, and always finds solutions with confidence and care. His expertise and dedication truly set him apart. I’m grateful for all of his help and would highly recommend him to anyone looking for an exceptional attorney.

Michael is an outstanding lawyer to work with. He is precise, detail oriented and leaves no stone unturned to solve a problem. His work is impeccable and I appreciate having access to a lawyer that really has a deep understanding of law to resolve sensitive and complex issues.

Instead, they prioritized the mother, meeting with her twice, even involving my daughter, all while neglecting my presence. To make matters worse, they allowed the mother to relocate our daughter out of our county, tearing her away from her siblings and disrupting the stability she had in her home county. This firm's actions not only failed to preserve family unity but actively contributed to its destruction, breaking generational bonds in the process. Avoid these ignorant and negligent individuals at all costs. If I could out negative stars, I would.

Today when I called for an update, I got even more news that the lawyers working my case never received any of my paper work. I’ve used lawyers before, and the lack of communication is what kills me. There was even a court date where they notified the court they weren’t arriving but didn’t inform me on anything. The court decided to tell me after 4 hours of waiting in the room. Wasted a day of work, 80$ in commute for nothing. I’ll update this review when everything is resolved. Hopefully, we can find a solution to everything soon.

when we thought there was no possibility or hope in our case John Ventosa came through for us. Communications with John was never an issue, and when he says be patient and he’s working on it, just know he’s working on it. He did a great job and really helped my family in an impossible situation

Chris and John are consummate professionals, knowledgeable lawyers, and overall great people to work with.  They provide excellent insight into complex situations and work efficiently.  Their only goal is to provide the best outcome for their clients. I am grateful for the exceptional service I received from McCabe, Coleman, Ventosa & Patterson PLLC. They helped me navigate a complicated property issue and their advice was tremendously helpful. I spoke with Dean McGee who took the time to fully understand my situation and clearly explained the applicable laws and my options. Thanks to Dean McGee's knowledgeable guidance, I am in the process of resolving the matter efficiently and to my satisfaction. I truly appreciated Dean McGee's responsiveness, attention to detail, and ability to make a difficult process feel stress-free. The entire team made me feel welcome and well cared for. I would not hesitate to recommend McCabe, Coleman, Ventosa & Patterson PLLC to others dealing with any type of real estate or property legal needs. Their expertise and customer service far exceeded my expectations.

I was improperly informed of what they could do. Promises were made that aren’t lived up to. One of the partners said something was done that I suspect was a lie that I’m waiting to hear back on. Asking for attorney to call me back was always met with a 2 week and multiple phone calls back to get my attorney on the line. Only to have the attorney say all great news going good then have my case dropped. Beware of false promises from the attorneys to have you sign in the dotted line. Make sure you ask all your questions and make sure you are clear that the promises are a marketing ploy.

Update: On the day of my last review I asked for my case file. I was told no problem we will get it out to you immediately. As of today I am still waiting. It is 8/8/23.

Ouimette, Goldstein & Andrew’s LLP Attorneys At Law were the most helpful law firm for my workers compensation case. They were reliable and guided me through the entire process and made sure I was well taken care of.

Melissa at the Poughkeepsie office was atrocious and useless and has no personality. Been out of work for over a month and emailed her for 2weeks in regards to any update, I kept getting single word answers, then when John finally called me he told me they didn’t even have the file they needed to start the process. What a waste.
Read the reviews before choosing who you want to represent and actually take care of you in your hard time of stress and pain.
I’ve changed attorneys after she hung up on me.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Lisa,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us. We sincerely apologize for your frustration and disappointment while working with our team, particularly with Melissa. We strive to provide attentive and effective support to all our clients, and it’s clear we fell short in your case.

We understand how crucial communication is during such difficult times, and we regret that you received inadequate responses to your inquiries. Your feedback is invaluable, and we will address it internally to ensure our team improves in providing timely and thorough communication.

Regarding your case and the file issues, we recognize the importance of having all necessary documentation to proceed. We are currently reviewing the circumstances to ensure this does not happen in the future.

We appreciate your feedback and are saddened to hear that you felt the need to change attorneys. Our goal is to help our clients navigate through their challenges with care and professionalism. If you would like to discuss your experience further or if there’s anything we can do to assist you, please reach out directly.

Thank you again for your feedback, and we wish you the best in your ongoing efforts.
Thank you for your confidence in us. We appreciate the opportunity to assist you.

reviews.text: I have been working with this extraordinary law firm since my injury occurred in 2007.  It is now 2023. Along my long path of dealing with the often confusing and frustrating workers comp and social security procedures and documentation, they have answered every question I had. reviews.text: Overall the most horrible service and ineffective results. I suffered a concussion which left me with a diagnosis of partial permanent brain damage , plus other soft tissue injuries . I was out of work almost a year and only returned when workers comp pay ended. The last three yrs of work were horrendous and debilitating and during this time this law firm never advised me I could file for disability. I retired and moved to Georgia and then I filed for disability there, got it. Every time I had tried to call the office when I still lived in NY , the person I was assigned to would routinely hang up on me, not give messages to the attorneys, and was never sanctioned for her treatment of me. I’ve been asked to provide data for compensation  regarding part time work and never received a dime for lost wages that they had promised. They never got me any money for the permanent brain damage. I’ve been totally abandoned by them , with no contact in years. They are inept .

reviews.text: If you are thinking about filing for bankruptcy there is no better law firm to have by your side than Dantzman & Dantzman. Greg and Priscilla have years of expereience on this field and made the process very easy. I filed for bankruptcy today and Greg explained everything to me and I feel confident this is the best decision I could have made. My only regret is not making the decision sooner, the longer you wait the more you are exposed to judgements, collections, garnishments, etc. Don’t wait, the sooner you file the sooner you will be protected from all the creditors. It is not an easy decision but remember that it is an opportunity to get us back on track when things are not going our way. Wealthy people and companies file for bankruptcy all the time, there is nothing to be ashamed of. So if you are thinking about it, schedule an appointment with Greg and listen and do everything he advises and you will be just fine! Goodluck! Greg - thank you! You are the best Bankruptcy attorney in the nation! 🫡
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Dan, we are glad you chose us to help you through this process.  Thank you for your very generous and kind words.
